opinion.h4: IN RE KELLEY. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF VIRGINIA. No. 733, Misc. Decided February 19, 1962.
opinion.p: 368 U.S. 517 QUINTON ET AL. v. MATTHEWS ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ALASKA. No. 762, Misc. Decided February 19, 1962.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari certiorari is denied.
368 U.S. 517 SHAPIRO v. JOSEPHSON ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 805, Misc. Decided February 19, 1962.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
